title: Always Loaded
description: Allows portal chunk loaders to automatically restart after a server restart
body:
### **Description**

Server-side fabric mod that allows portal chunk loaders to automatically restart after a server restart.

### **How does it work?**

When the server is about to stop, Always Loaded saves all pending chunk tickets into a file(world/.../[dimension]/data/tickets.saved).
Then, when the server starts, it just recreates them.

**Always Loaded** works both in multiplayer and in singleplayer.

### This mod is now obsolete as of 1.21.5(25w02a) because Mojang added the same functionality in the game.
